features: LUXURIOUS BLACK ORCHID SCENT: Immerse yourself in a sensual and captivating fragrance that transforms your bath into a luxurious experience.
NOURISHING GINKGO BILOBA EXTRACT: Infused with antioxidant-rich ginkgo biloba extract to protect, strengthen, and revitalize your skin, leaving it soft and rejuvenated.
SOOTHING PANTHENOL & VITAMIN E: Panthenol accelerates skin regeneration, while Vitamin E provides potent anti-ageing benefits, restoring vitality and moisture.
AHA CITRIC ACID FOR RADIANT SKIN: The gentle exfoliating action of citric acid helps smooth skin and remove dead skin cells for a brighter, more even complexion.
RELAXING AND CLEANSING FOAM: This rich bath foam creates a frothy, aromatic lather that envelops your skin in luxurious comfort, perfect for relieving stress and unwinding after a long day.
Captivating Aroma of the Infamous Black Orchid: It indulges your senses and elevates your skincare experience.
